title: The Crew Searches for Proof
description: On pages 17, 18, 19, 20, this part focuses on jaya’s strange sea. The Straw Hats reach waters filled with strange creatures, salvage crews, and rumors that begin pulling them toward Jaya.
scene: This scene belongs to the Jaya’s Strange Sea sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Sanji, Smoker.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: P-please don't refer to me like that!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's an appropriate figure for them.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And even defeated Daz Bones at Alubarma.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: At BW, he was called Mr. 1.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: In the end, he was defeated.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It's time to begin the chase again!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What's up with all the lifeless replies?

summary: The Straw Hats reach waters filled with strange creatures, salvage crews, and rumors that begin pulling them toward Jaya.
